title: ingest_epic_start (brownfield)
description: Start the Brownfield Epic-to-Spec front door. Receives a Rally Epic payload (content only — no credentials). Returns a taskId to poll. The server delegates Phase A to the Solution Accelerator Agent's create_epic_signal_ledger FunctionTool, then runs Phase B deterministic mapping.

epic.description: Rally Epic content (formatted_id, name, description, integrations_text, acceptance_criteria, nfrs, object_version, last_update_date).
